Second equation: a + ((n-5)/2)*3 = 296. Substitute a from first equation:

302 - (3(n-1)/2) + (3(n-5)/2) = 296

Simplify: 302 + [ -3(n-1) + 3(n-5) ] / 2 = 296

The numerator inside the brackets: -3n +3 +3n -15 = -12

So 302 - 12/2 = 302 -6 = 296, which matches. So the solution is correct. Thus, verification is sufficient here.
